Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad() self.labelText = Auctionator.Constants.Durations.Short; self.value = 12;
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad() self.labelText = Auctionator.Constants.Durations.Medium; self.value = 24;
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad() self.labelText = Auctionator.Constants.Durations.Long; self.value = 48;
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonGroupMixin); self:InitializeRadioButtonGroup() Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigHorizontalRadioButtonGroupMixin); self.groupHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DURATION;
